name: A4 · Beneficiary intake → Supabase record + Drive folder
_doc: Importable scaffold. Trigger: Google Form (intake) submission. Creates a private beneficiaries row (consent_public=false) and a Drive case folder named by ref_code. Public profile fields are filled later by a human only if consent was given. Templates/fields: ../../data/beneficiary-intake.md.

parameters._note: Use the Google Forms / Sheets trigger on the intake form's responses sheet.

parameters.name: ={{ $json.ref_code }}
parameters._note: Create under Drive 01_BENEFICIARIES/Case Files/. Then store the consent form link back on the row.
Notify web manager IF consent_public to fill public_name/story/photo. Otherwise done (private record only).
